message:
fix: resolve deploy-test and cache-test nightly failures (#8819)

deploy-test (#8810): Add missing /health endpoint mock so
checkBackendAvailability() returns true. Add kc-agent route mock
(127.0.0.1:8585) and utility endpoint catch-alls. Track kubectl/agent
calls in apiCallLog so hasAnyCalls assertion counts all data-fetching
paths. Set kc-backend-status in localStorage during setup.

cache-test (#8811): Add retry logic to captureColdSnapshots to handle
transient execution-context invalidation when page.evaluate races with
background navigation. Add missing skipRoutePatterns for newly added
endpoints (self-upgrade, admin, acmm).

Fixes #8810, Fixes #8811

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
